title: HaveASolTime
description: An add-on to galacticraft that adds the star sol to the game.
body:
Currentelly WIP

A Galacticraft Addon.

Lets you land on Sol, the Central Star of the Galacticraft Solar System.

[ToTheStars](https://modrinth.com/mod/tothestars) is a Required Dependency (Use version 0.1.1).

Also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/haveasoltime "HaveASolTime CurseForge").
